summary: The diff addresses all four requirements. REQ-1 is handled by updating anchor IDs (hero vs accueil), adding ErrorBoundary wrappers, and defensive try/catch in scroll handlers. REQ-2 is handled by updating sitemap.xml and robots.txt to use the correct production domain. REQ-3 is handled by preserving the Google Search Console verification file unchanged. REQ-4 is handled by updating canonical, og:url, og:image, twitter:image, and JSON-LD in index.html to use https://verdiercouverture.fr/. The sitemap lastmod is set to 2026-03-01 which satisfies the AC of 2025-07-28 or later.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer includes a caffeine.ai attribution with UTM tracking link
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding or preserving a caffeine.ai attribution or UTM tracking link in the footer. This appears to be an added feature not requested by any requirement.
